title: RegionReport
description: Per-warning-region drought assessment output written to data/processed/warning_regions/{region_id}.json

region_name_de.description: German name of the warning region

data_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 datetime of the source dataset

cdi.description: Combined Drought Indicator (0 = no drought … 5 = exceptional)

spi_3m.description: 3-month Standardised Precipitation Index; null when unavailable

soil_moisture_pct.description: Soil moisture as percentage of usable field capacity; null when unavailable

vhi.description: Vegetation Health Index (0–100 scale, i.e. the raw 0–1 value × 100); null when unavailable

cdi_trend.description: Week-on-week CDI change: +1 worsening, 0 stable, -1 improving

pct_critical.description: Fraction of the last 52 weeks with CDI ≥ cdi.critical_min (0.0–1.0)

spi_3m_percentile.description: Percentile of current SPI-3m within historic distribution (0–100)

precip_1m_index.description: 1-month precipitation deficit index (1–5, 1 = normal, 5 = extreme deficit)

warnlevel.description: Official BAFU warning level (1–5); falls back to max(cdi, 1) when not available

warnlevel_info_de.description: German descriptive text for the warning level

warnlevel_info_fr.description: French descriptive text for the warning level

cdi_forecast_week2.description: CDI forecast for approximately 14 days ahead; null if forecast data unavailable

precip_1m_index_forecast.description: Precipitation index forecast for approximately 14 days ahead; null if unavailable

soil_moisture_index_forecast.description: Soil moisture index forecast for approximately 14 days ahead; null if unavailable

precip_deficit_delta.description: Precipitation index change from current to week-2 forecast

soil_moisture_deficit_delta.description: Soil moisture index change from current to week-2 forecast

vhi_index.description: VHI stress index (1–5): 1 = Normal/Good/Excellent (VHI ≥ 40), 2 = Slightly Stressed, 3 = Stressed, 4 = Very Stressed, 5 = Extremely Stressed. Thresholds in config/rules.yaml → vhi.thresholds.

discharge.description: Discharge station summary for the region

n_total.description: Total discharge stations with usable reference data

n_low.description: Stations with current flow below threshold1 (low flow)

n_very_low.description: Stations with current flow below q347 (very low flow; subset of n_low)

pct_low.description: Percentage of stations with low flow (0–100); 0 when n_total = 0

hydro_stations.description: Individual discharge station readings for this region

threshold1.description: Low-flow threshold1 for this day-of-year (m³/s); null when unavailable

min_value.description: Historical minimum discharge for this day-of-year (m³/s); null when unavailable
